crons.name: security-scan
crons.prompt: Security Scan: Daily 6 AM. For each repo (clearpath, lifecycle-killer, nonprofit-hub): (1) Check npm audit for critical/high vulnerabilities. (2) Scan for hardcoded secrets or API keys in recent commits (git log -10 + grep). (3) Check .env files are gitignored. (4) Verify no new endpoints without auth middleware. Report findings to Josh via Telegram. If critical: alert immediately. If clean: silent.

crons.name: uptime-check
crons.prompt: Uptime Check: Every 30 min. Curl each production URL and check for 200 response: clearpath-production-c86d.up.railway.app, lifecycle-killer-production.up.railway.app, nonprofit-hub-production.up.railway.app. If any returns non-200 or times out (>10s), alert Josh via Telegram immediately with the failing service and status code. Otherwise UPTIME_OK.

crons.name: performance-check
crons.prompt: Performance Check: Weekday 9 AM. For each production app: (1) Curl 3 key endpoints and measure response times. (2) Check Railway logs for error rate spikes in last 24h. (3) Check for memory/CPU warnings. Report only if issues found. If all healthy: silent.

crons.name: dependency-audit
crons.prompt: Dependency Audit: Monday 10 AM. For each repo: run npm outdated, flag major version bumps and security-related updates. Check if any dependencies have been deprecated. Send summary to Josh via Telegram only if action needed.
